name: cli-tool
description: Reference colony for a cross-platform CLI project (shipctl persona). Demonstrates SkDD skills for release pipelines, build matrices, flag management, man page generation, and breaking-change audits.

skills.name: release-cut
skills.description: Cut a versioned release: bump version, generate changelog, tag, and draft GitHub release.

skills.name: cross-compile-matrix
skills.description: Add a new target triple to the cross-platform build matrix.

skills.name: flag-add
skills.description: Add a CLI flag end-to-end: parser, help text, completions, docs, and tests.

skills.name: manpage-sync
skills.description: Regenerate man pages and shell completions when commands change.

skills.name: breaking-change-audit
skills.description: Pre-release audit of public flags, exit codes, and output formats vs the last tag.
